channel.title: Compiler on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Compiler on Arrans github.io

item.title: typst/typst
item.description: A markup-based typesetting system that is powerful and easy to learn.

item.title: Rust-GPU/rust-gpu
item.description: 🐉 Making Rust a first-class language and ecosystem for GPU shaders 🚧

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: glebbash/LO
item.description: LO - small programming language targeting WASM that aims to be as simple as possible

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: gleam-lang/gleam
item.description: ⭐️ A friendly language for building type-safe, scalable systems!

item.title: sveltejs/svelte
item.description: web development for the rest of us

item.title: carbon-language/carbon-lang
item.description: Carbon Language’s main repository: documents, design, implementation, and related tools. (NOTE: Carbon Language is experimental; see README)

item.title: nim-lang/Nim
item.description: Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language. It combines successful concepts from mature languages like Python, Ada and Modula. Its design focuses on efficiency, expressiveness, and elegance (in that order of priority).

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: borgo-lang/borgo
item.description: Borgo is a statically typed language that compiles to Go.

item.title: kcl-lang/kcl
item.description: KCL Programming Language Core and API (CNCF Sandbox Project). https://kcl-lang.io

item.title: natalie-lang/natalie
item.description: a work-in-progress Ruby compiler, written in Ruby and C++

item.title: Genivia/RE-flex
item.description: Yet another high-performance C++ regex library and lexical analyzer generator like Flex: extends Flex++ with Unicode support, indent/dedent anchors, lazy quantifiers, functions for lex and syntax error reporting and more. Seamlessly integrates with Bison and other parsers.
